presets.label: Love in Hebrew & Greek
presets.description: Explore how love is expressed across both Testaments — from chesed and ahab to agapē and phileō.

presets.label: Covenant Theology
presets.description: Trace the thread of covenant (berith) through Scripture — from Noah to the New Covenant.

presets.label: Names of God
presets.description: Discover the many names and titles used for God — Elohim, YHWH, Adonai, Theos, and more.

presets.label: Faith & Trust
presets.description: How do the original languages express faith, belief, and trust — from batach and emunah to pistis?

presets.label: Suffering & Hope
presets.description: Explore the tension between affliction and expectation across Scripture.

presets.label: The Word (Logos)
presets.description: The rich concept of logos — word, reason, account — and its Hebrew counterpart dabar.

presets.label: Spirit — Ruach & Pneuma
presets.description: Wind, breath, spirit — trace this concept from Genesis to Revelation.

presets.label: Righteousness & Justice
presets.description: Tsedaqah and dikaiosynē — the intertwined concepts of righteousness and justice.
